title: Mehabooba Tamil Lyrics KG2
stanzas:
Vaa vaa ena anbae
en vazhvin peranbae
vandhai kanmunne
idhu nijama sol anbe

un kangal kadhal pesum
en tharunam malarum swasam
un thozhgalil saayum neram
uyir thulirum perazhagaai

poo vaika poogaatru
seer seithathey
pudhu vaanam poo thoovuthey

konjal mozhi mesidum
oomai kili naanadaa
nenjai vali theerkkum
marundhaalan neethaanada

vaazhvin ver neengidum
kaalam idhu thaanadaa
anbin neer vaarkum
mugilaalan neethaanadaa

un kaigalum theendum tharunam
naan thaninthen thaninthen salanam
ini vazhkaiyil yaethu maranam
naan eduthaen pudhu jananam
tamilStanzas:
வா வா என் அன்பே  
என் வாழ்வின் பேரன்பே
வந்தாய் கண்முன்னே
இது நிஜமா சொல் அன்பே

உன் கண்கள் காதல் பேசும்
என் தருணம் மலரும்
உன் தோழ்களில் சாயும் நேரம்
உயிர் துளிரும் பேரழகாய்

பூ வைக்க பூங்காற்று
சீர் செய்ததோ
புது வானம் பூ தூவுதே

கொஞ்சல் மொழி பேசிடும்
ஊமை கிளி நானடா
நெஞ்சை வலி தீர்க்கும்
மருந்தாளன் நீதானடா

வாழ்வின் வேர் நீங்கிடும்
காலம் இது தானடா
அன்பின் நீர் வார்க்கும்
முகிலாளன் நீதானடா

உன் கைகளும் தீண்டும் தருணம்
நான் தணிந்தேன் தணிந்தேன் சலனம்
இனி வாழ்க்கையில்ஏது மரணம்
நான் எடுத்தேன் புது ஜனனம்

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Mehabooba?

Mehabooba expresses deep emotions of love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic relationships.

In which movie is the song featured?

The song is featured in the movie KGF2.

Who is the singer of Mehabooba?

The song is sung by Ananya Bhat.

Who wrote the lyrics for the song?

The lyrics were penned by Madhurakavi.

When was Mehabooba released?

The song was released on May 15, 2022.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mehabooba, the lyrics beautifully articulate the feelings of love and connection between two souls. The song serves as a backdrop to moments of romance, evoking a sense of nostalgia and warmth. Ananya Bhat's soothing voice enhances the emotional depth, making it a perfect fit for intimate occasions. The melody resonates with anyone who cherishes love, making it a timeless addition to the soundtrack of KGF2.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mehabooba is a mesmerizing romantic melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Ananya Bhat's soulful vocals and Madhurakavi's poignant lyrics, this song is sure to resonate with anyone who has experienced the magic of love. Dive into the enchanting world of KGF2 and let the music sweep you off your feet!
stanzaMeanings: Come, come my dear, the essence of my life has come before me, is this really true, my love?
Your eyes speak of love, my youth blooms, your touch brings life, and in that moment, I feel beautiful.
Flowers should not be kept away, they should be spread, a new sky should be filled with flowers.
The sweet words you speak are like a silent bird, you are the medicine that heals my heart's pain.
This is the time when life is at its peak, you are the cloud that brings the rain of love.
Your hands also seek youth, I have given myself completely, now in this life, I have taken a new birth, not death.
